name: Country Creamed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 half boneless chicken breasts, skinned and cubed
1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of chicken soup
1 can (14 1/2 oz.) cut green beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the cubed chicken and thyme (if using) to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked through.
3. Stir together the cream of chicken soup and milk in a bowl.
4. Pour the soup mixture into the skillet with the chicken. Gently stir to combine.
5. Add the cut green beans to the skillet. Heat everything through for another 2-3 minutes, or until heated thoroughly.
6. Serve the chicken over hot buttered noodles or mashed potatoes. Garnish with chopped parsley if desired. Serve with hot biscuits or bread, if desired. Makes 6 servings.
